mapper.insert: insert into astschema.class_table(file_id, class_name, is_interface, modifier, output_id, package_name) values (#{file_id}, #{className}, #{isInterface}, #{modifier}, #{outputId}, #{packageName});
insert into astschema.method_table (class_id, method_name, return_type, modifier, output_id) values (#{classId}, #{methodName}, #{returnType}, #{modifier}, #{outputId})
insert into astschema.parameter_table (method_id, param_name, param_type, position, output_id) values (#{methodId}, #{paramName}, #{paramType}, #{position}, #{outputId});

insert into astschema.dependency_table (source_class, source_method, target_class, target_method, dependency_type, output_id) values (#{sourceClass}, #{sourceMethod}, #{targetClass}, #{targetMethod}, #{dependencyType}, #{outputId})
insert into client_side_schema.page_table(page_name, path, type) VALUES (#{pageName}, #{path}, #{type})
insert into client_side_schema.el_expression_table (page_id, expression, target_class, target_method, line_number) values (#{pageId}, #{expression}, #{targetClass}, #{targetMethod}, #{lineNumber})
insert into client_side_schema.taglib_table (page_id, prefix, uri) values (#{pageId}, #{prefix}, #{uri})

insert into hybridanalysis.analysis_result (source_folder_id, user_id, project_path, analysis_time, dependency_graph, java_classes, xml_configs, jsf_files, issues, total_java_files, total_xhtml_files, total_xml_files, total_issues, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sourceFolderId}, #{userId}, #{projectPath}, #{analysisTime}, #{dependencyGraph}, #{javaClasses}, #{xmlConfigs}, #{jsfFiles}, #{issues}, #{totalJavaFiles}, #{totalXhtmlFiles}, #{totalXmlFiles}, #{totalIssues}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE hybridanalysis.analysis_result
source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}, user_id = #{userId},
project_path = #{projectPath}, analysis_time = #{analysisTime},
dependency_graph = #{dependencyGraph}, java_classes = #{javaClasses}, xml_configs = #{xmlConfigs}, jsf_files = #{jsfFiles}, issues = #{issues},
total_java_files = #{totalJavaFiles}, total_xhtml_files = #{totalXhtmlFiles}, total_xml_files = #{totalXmlFiles}, total_issues = #{totalIssues},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from astschema.dependency_table where id = #{id} and output_id = #{outputId} LIMIT 1000
delete from astschema.parameter_table where id = #{id} and output_id = #{outputId} LIMIT 1000
delete from astschema.method_table where id = #{id} and output_id = #{outputId} LIMIT 1000
delete from astschema.class_table where id = #{id} and output_id = #{outputId} LIMIT 1000
delete from hybridanalysis.ast_output where user_id =#{userId} and source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
